title: The service I have received has been…
text:
The service I have received has been absolutely unacceptable. It has taken nearly two months to receive a refund for a return that was confirmed as delivered on 4 February. Throughout this entire process I have received contradictory information and excuses, including being told the parcel was still “in transit,” despite tracking clearly showing it had already been delivered to your warehouse.

The constant misinformation and lack of accountability has been extremely frustrating and disappointing. Your website states that refunds are processed within a certain timeframe, yet this has clearly not been honoured in my case.

Based on this experience, I would never recommend anyone purchase from ALO. The returns process described on your website does not reflect the reality of the service being provided, and this should be reviewed and corrected so that customers are not misled.

This has been one of the most frustrating customer service experiences I have ever encountered.

title: This company is one big issue after another
text:
This company is one big scam, their customer service is awful. 

I had a damaged item and they arranged a replacement. I then decided I wanted to return as the quality was equally as shocking. They refused the refund and return and instead said I would get store credit. They then proceeded to drag me along for weeks and weeks on why I hadn’t received it. When I chased a final time, they then said I couldn’t have it as it’s out of returns window. It’s absolutely shocking they are able to trade and they certainly know nothing about the law. 

I’ve been asking for a subject access request which they’ve ignored and one of their customer service actually terminated the chat for me asking. They don’t follow the law or the rules and instead they mess you around with poor quality items and even poorer customer service. 

I’m still waiting for my subject access request and a point for escalation.

title: I recently visited this store in dublin
text:
I recently visited this store and unfortunately had a very uncomfortable experience. I walked in carrying a reusable shopping bag, which I often bring with me when I’m out. Shortly after entering, I noticed staff members repeatedly watching me and following me around the store while continuously looking at my bag.
This made me feel very uneasy and singled out while I was simply trying to browse like any other customer. I eventually approached a staff member to politely ask if there was an issue or if my bag was a problem, but the response I received was dismissive and came across as quite rude.
As a customer, I expect to feel welcomed and treated with basic respect when entering a store. Instead, I felt judged and uncomfortable the entire time I was there. I hope management looks into how customers are approached in situations like this, because no one should feel monitored or unwelcome while shopping.

title: Terrible quality and worse customer service

title: Learned my lesson!
text:
I’ve lived and traveled in dozens of countries, but truthfully the worst customer service experience would be right here with Alo!

I ordered a pink tennis dress when I was living in Australia. The shipment was prompt, and so was the arrival. The problem? Instead, I received a matching set of brown sweats. 
Not only did I have to reach out to multiple customer service agents, go to DHL and ship the wrong order back myself (before they would consider a replacement) but they kept asking for pictures of the wrong items even after I had already shipped everything back! 

They were so slow to provide a solution or replacement that 3 weeks passed and I already moved out of Australia. 

The next month, I was going back back-and-forth probably over a dozen emails with different customer service agents, some saying that yes they can ship my order to another country, with the final verdict being that they can’t! (So the other agents just gave me wrong information?)

So I was just refunded the money, two months later. 

If they were more prompt and careful not only in the initial order, but in the replacement, everything would have been fine. Never seen such a company where everything is up to the customer to move the problem forward and get a solution.

Waiting for me to ship the wrong order back BEFORE they can send me the correct order? 
Normally a company with good customer service should not even request you go through the hassle of shipping them back, just through the pictures and proof you provide they should send you your correct order without the extra fuss of dozens of emails and weeks of time spent.

title: Refund Outstanding – Conflicting Policies & Lack of Transparency
text:
My recent experience with returns has been extremely disappointing.

I lodged two returns and the parcels were accepted into the retailer’s designated logistics network using their official prepaid labels. Tracking confirmed the parcels were received and processed within their logistics partner’s system. Despite this, I was later told the returns were “lost,” even though they were already inside the company’s own returns network.

What followed was over a month of delays, escalations, and inconsistent information:

• The return portal stated refunds are issued within 7 business days after receipt
• Live chat advised 5–7 business days
• Email support later stated 15–21 business days after warehouse delivery
• Another agent said the refund would be processed within 2 business days due to the inconsistency

That’s four different timeframes for the same returns.

I was also not informed at purchase that international returns are consolidated through a third-party freight process, which can significantly delay warehouse receipt and refund timelines. This materially affects customers but isn’t clearly disclosed.

After multiple escalations and ongoing vague responses, the parcels were declared lost in transit by the retailer. The refund was ultimately processed more than a month later, and only after persistent follow-up.

This experience showed a lack of transparency, consistency, and accountability that I would not expect from a premium brand. At this stage, I am reconsidering future purchases.

title: Terrible customer service
text:
Somehow my package got switched in transit with someone elses. I ended up receiving a Nintendo ds game. I realize this wasn't alo's fault, however the shipping company told me I needed to contact the shipper. I did the chat and they asked me to send them pictures and I'd be contacted within 48 to 72 hours. I wasn't contacted, so I did another chat and they said it was in progress. After a week I contacted them again and they said there were too many inconsistencies and there was nothing they could do and to have a wonderful day. I emailed them back and said that was unacceptable and I wanted my issue escalated to management. It's been two weeks and no one has contacted me.

My husband and I were able to figure who received our package with a phone number that was in the package. Luckily they were a decent person and replied to us and we made arrangements to switch the packages but we needed to drive 6 hours (3 hours there and 3 hours back).

I am so disappointed, I will never order online from them again. We had gone to a store in Toronto and the staff were amazing and the quality of what we got was really good  but they need a major over haul on their customer service. With a company this large they should be able to make things rights when something goes wrong. It was a very expensive order for us but would have been immaterial to them.

title: Exchange Mishandled After Weeks of Delays
text:
I purchased a Sherpa trench in January and received it without any issues, but it was too large. I processed an online exchange for a replacement that showed as in stock and returned the original item. On 1/29, I received confirmation that Alo had received the package and that the exchange was being processed.

Two weeks later, having received no updates, I reached out and was told the replacement had been processed and would ship within a day or two. After another two weeks passed with no shipment, I contacted customer service again — this time I was told the item was actually out of stock, had never shipped, and that I would be refunded.

Four weeks with no communication, only to be told it’s out of stock and that’s the end of it. Extremely disappointing experience. I won’t be purchasing from this brand again.

title: Disappointing customer service
text:
I’m extremely disappointed with my experience returning items to this company.

I followed the return instructions provided with my order, which stated I could book a courier collection where the driver would bring a return label. However, when I tried to arrange this, that option didn’t exist. I contacted customer support multiple times within the return window asking for a workable solution because I don’t have access to a printer. Despite providing all requested information, I either received generic replies or no response at all.

Because of their incorrect instructions and lack of support, I was left unable to return my items within the timeframe through no fault of my own. I’ve now had to open a PayPal dispute just to get this resolved.

Customer service should not make a simple return this difficult. Until this is addressed, I would strongly advise others to be cautious when ordering, especially if you don’t have easy access to printing facilities.

title: I ordered a pullover (order #34465876)…
text:
I ordered a pullover (order #34465876) on February 9th. The item was never shipped, and instead I received a virtual store credit without
my consent.
I reached out to customer service multiple times, but they did not provide a proper resolution. I specifically wanted the item I ordered, in the color I chose, which is now sold out.
This experience was very disappointing. I hope Alo improves their fulfillment and refund process so that other customers do not face the same issue.
update: After my review, the company reached out and processed a full refund to my original payment method. I appreciate that the issue was eventually resolved, although the initial experience was frustrating.

title: Appalling customer service/Poor Quality Clothing
text:
Appalling customer service - Be Vigilant checking your invoice - 
Company needs investigating false advertising of misleading information advertising free gifts with purchase (never received) 
Refund still not received - I am still chasing my refund 
I have also been charged for the ‘free’ tote bags that never even arrived 
Quality  of goods poor - Adanola much better quality 
I will never purchase from ALO ever again

title: Terrible experience
text: Bought a sweater from them to be shipped to London for my sister’s birthday. The item never arrived, wasn’t even shipped after 2 weeks of purchasing. So after a lot of back and forth I decided to call them and demand my money back. That was also an ordeal in itself but hopefully will get my money back. Very dissatisfied with this company and their customer service, better to be avoided and the quality is awful as I hear.

title: I am a very loyal customer spending so…
text: I am a very loyal customer spending so much money with Alo. The accolade items just bobble after one wash… it’s disgraceful for the price they are charging. No straightforward way of contacting them to rectify issues. I have over 2000 Alo Access points that I can never use as the gifts are always out of stock - to be honest none of them even seem like a gift for all the money and loyalty shown and spent! I think I’ll be moving away from this brand now sadly.

title: The $150+ sweatshirt was actually worth…
text: The $150+ sweatshirt was actually worth about $10 and started to fall apart less than 24 hours after purchase. Good on them for whoever they are marketing towards but I will never purchase a thing from them again. And they make it hard to review on site. I suspect they know how poor their products are. Zero stars if I could. Bad product, bad taste all around.

title: Very unfriendly sellers in Manhatten
text: Very unfriendly sellers in Manhatten. The best thing is to leave the shop.

title: I’m extremely disappointed with my…
text:
I’m extremely disappointed with my experience at alo. The quality of the clothes is great, but the customer service has been consistently poor and unprofessional.

On multiple visits I felt judged and treated differently depending on how I was dressed. The staff seem selective about who they choose to help, and the attitude has come across as rude and dismissive more than once.

Today was the worst experience. I placed a same day delivery order early in the morning so I could wear the outfit to the gym. The store handed my order to the wrong person, which led to the actual driver canceling the delivery. I spent over an hour on the phone trying to resolve a mistake that was not mine. First I was told they would fix it, then I was informed they could no longer deliver and that I had to reorder after waiting all that time.

No accountability, no real solution, and no effort to make things right after the stress and inconvenience caused. I genuinely love the brand’s style, but the way customers are treated needs serious improvement.

title: APPALLING CUSTOMER SERVICE
text:
I’ve been an on-current customer purchasing ALO as I’ve been a fan of the brand, but I’m extremely disappointed with this matter. Order online from Ireland. I was expecting 3-5 business days for delivery as the order had been confirmed on 12 December. I’ve been waiting 2 months now for the order to arrive and I’m extremely frustrated with how ALO is treating this. I went to the shop, they said they can’t do anything about it as they don’t authorise online orders. I’ve tried refunding but the process is having to wait for the order to arrive in order to refund. It’s ridiculous I’ve to wait this long, with no confirmation or update on the order as well. I’ve already emailed ALO multiple times and still yet to receive any response from them. I’m extremely disappointed with the customer service. An order shouldn’t have to take this long that you’re paying good money for. 
— WILL NOT BE BUYING FROM THIS BRAND AND WOULDN’T RECOMMEND!!!

title: Ich kann das gleiche Problem bestätigen…
text: Ich kann das gleiche Problem bestätigen wie die meisten hier. Artikel zurückgeschickt. Man bekommt kein Geld. Paypal hat jetzt ein zweites Mal den Fall abgelehnt. Trotz Bestätigung von Alo selber, angeblich Geld gutgeschrieben zu haben. Ich kann nur jeden Warnen hier nichts zu bestellen.

title: Horrifying
text: Horrifying! Ordered with black friday October 2025. Alo didn’t send 20 items of my order. I still didn’t get my money back. I’ve send more than 100 emails and they keep changing the narrative. Your money is not save there unfortunately.

title: Seit Wochen keine Rückerstattung (Bestellung #31310034)
text:
Ich bin extrem enttäuscht von Alo Yoga.

Meine Retoure wurde laut Sendungsverfolgung am 15.12.2025 beim Verkäufer zugestellt. Bis heute habe ich keine vollständige Rückerstattung erhalten – es geht um über 1.000€.

Besonders ärgerlich: Mir wurden zwei Retourenlabel zugesendet. Ich habe beide Pakete ordnungsgemäß zurückgeschickt. Allerdings wurde nur ein Artikel aus zwei Paketen bearbeitet und erstattet. Der Rest wurde offenbar intern falsch zugeordnet. Seitdem herrscht komplettes Durcheinander.

Ich habe weder die Ware noch mein Geld zurück.

Seit Wochen schreibe ich mit dem Kundenservice und bekomme keine klare Lösung. Statt Unterstützung bedeutet das Ganze nur Stress und Aufwand für mich als Kundin.

Am Anfang war ich von der Marke wirklich begeistert – Qualität und Image haben überzeugt. Doch dieser Umgang mit einer Retoure ist absolut inakzeptabel, vor allem bei diesem Bestellwert.

Ich kann aktuell nur davon abraten, aus Deutschland zu bestellen, wenn man im Fall einer Retoure wochenlang seinem Geld hinterherlaufen muss.

Bestellnummer: #31310034

Ich hoffe sehr, dass sich das Problem zeitnah klärt.

title: You send damaged suit second time
text: You send damaged suit second time. You are really made me upset. Your team doesnt help me. You dont resend items again, you dont refund buy store credit. You are not good at all.

title: Painful trying to get a refund
text: Painful trying to get a refund. Don’t answer emails and chat box is not helpful.

title: Worst experience ever
text:
Worst experience ever – extremely disappointing quality and customer service

This has been, without question, the worst experience I have ever had with a premium clothing brand.

I purchased a Candy Hearts hoodie and matching shorts (€225 total) from an official Alo Yoga store at Westfield London while traveling. The set was from a newly released collection and was washed once before first wear, strictly according to the care instructions. I never even got the chance to wear the items, because after this single wash they became severely pilled and completely unwearable.

This level of quality is unacceptable for such expensive activewear. What makes the situation even worse is the customer service. Despite providing clear photos and explanations, I was repeatedly told that nothing could be done. Alo USA claimed they are separate from Europe and refused responsibility, and I was essentially told that because I did not order online, this is “my fault.”

I do not live in the UK, and there is no Alo Yoga store in my country, so this response leaves me with defective products and no support whatsoever. No refund, no replacement, no real help — just excuses and deflection of responsibility.

For a brand that positions itself as premium, this is shocking. Poor product quality combined with zero accountability and dismissive customer service has completely destroyed my trust in Alo Yoga. I would strongly reconsider buying from this brand.

title: Keine Bestellung möglich
text: Keine Bestellung möglich, Kundenservice reagiert überhaupt nicht, stattdessen erhalte ich seitdem Werbung. ALO App Katastrophe. Einfach nur unprofessionell bisher.

title: garbage is better than this overpriced crap
text: Grandchild got $150.00 item two weeks ago. Pilling and totally cheap material.  Went to return it. Manager at Jefferson Parish Lakeside-Chiquita Banana-said they don’t care. I paid cash immediately for an identical one (just to make grandchild happy, but when I gave it to her I told her to make sure everyone knew about the experience). Told every single person on the way out of the store about this god awful experience. I’ll tell 50 more tomorrow and every day thereafter. Do not buy anything from these scam artists.

title: WORST CUSTOMER SERVICE EVER...
text: Alo has the worst customer service I have ever expierienced. All of the other reviews stating so sell short how bad they are. I recieved some very expensive joggers for Christmas and needed to return them for a different size/color, which took hours chatting with them to get the return label. They assured me the return would not be sent back to the original form of payment, and I would get the refund via gift card. Of course, that didn't happen and they refused to fix the issue, but at least they offered me a 10% off coupon to buy more joggers. I will never buy anything from this company ever again and I recommended you don't either.

title: Absolute appalling quality
text: Absolute appalling quality, for the price you pay! I bought an Accolade tracksuit& 3 Accolade hoodies, as well as leggings and jackets. The Accolade hoodies and tracksuit had so much pilling, even after the first wash, even after following instructions! The fabric is so cheap! ALO have an absolute cheek, charging these prices, when it probably cost around £10 each to make!

title: I bought my alo yoga sweater in Dubai…
text: I bought my alo yoga sweater in Dubai and by the first wash it was showing signs of pilling. I called all the uae stores but not one answered the phone during the opening hours. I was based in Ireland which didn’t help. The Dublin store again needed the Dubai store to confirm that I bought it there first before they could help me which was so bizarre. Apparently they are a separate business. I work in luxury retail and I can honestly say that this is so poor. I eat turned away for month even when the staff admitted this was a fault. They needed the proof or purchase in Dubai but my bank statement didn’t specify stores. It was jumbled numbers. Over priced and poor quality.

title: Einfach nur Betrug 😡Ich bin so…
text: Einfach nur Betrug 😡Ich bin so unendlich enttäuscht von diesem Online Shop. Seit November warte ich auf die Rückerstattung von gerade mal 39€ Ich kaufte am Black Friday ein Set . Oberteil 98€ und Hose. Anstatt 128€ für 89€.Sie war zu groß und Umtausch ging nicht. Sie sagten ich soll es zurückschicken und neu bestellen und die Differenz würde mir dann erstattet werden da ich ja a Black Friday den Einkauf tätigte. Die zurück gesendete Leggins wurde erstattet. Aber nicht die Differenz also der Rabatt. Ich warte bis zum heutigen Tag. Ich habe schon mehr als 50 E-Mails gesendet. Der Witz dabei ist das auch immer geantwortet wird. Das Service Team sagt dann immer ich hoffe wir treffen sie bei bester Gesundheit! Es ist unfassbar.Und jeden Tag schreibt eine anderer Mitarbeitende Faye , Felipe N. Sebastian . Es sind nur 39€. Aber ich fühle mich verarscht. Was mich wundert das sie damit durchgekommen. Habe auch Global angeschrieben. Es ist unfassbar. Wie gesagt seid November.

title: Achat effectué d’un montant de 930€00
text:
Achat effectué d’un montant de 930€00 , j’étais sensé recevoir un sac comme cadeau , jamais reçu ( apparemment le sac était en rupture d’estoc et la réponse que j’ai eu ça été ) le sac n’est plus disponible , et il ne vous sera pas envoyé ……. 
Je trouve que la qualité prix laisse à désirer, j’ai acheter le Cropped Main Character Jacket - Black - Black / d’un montant de 230€ solde , j’ai lavé avec toute mes soins et j’ai remarqué que le cropped noir n’était plus noir , au premier lavage la couleur est partir et sur certains endroits il était plus clair.
Donc déçu quand ont achète des affaires à ce prix et la couleur s’en va au premier lavage , après il va être de quelle couleur ? Je n’ose même pas porté car je ne sais pas comment il va être après .

Enfin ….
Je suis très très déçu de mon achat et surtout déçu de la réponse que j’ai eu vie le chat quand j’ai réclamé le sac , ils proposent un bonus et le montant ne te permet même pas d’acheter une paire de chaussettes ( vu le prix des articles ) en gros , si t’accepte , t’es obligé de t’acheter sur le site.

Bref .

title: Charged customs fees despite IOSS – very poor customer service
text:
Very disappointed with ALO Yoga’s customer service.
My order was shipped under IOSS and VAT was already paid at checkout, as clearly shown on the invoice. Despite this, DHL charged me additional VAT, customs and handling fees (around 35,70€) in order to receive my package.

I contacted ALO immediately and provided all documentation: invoice, proof of payment and delivery. After more than a week of delays and generic replies, they finally claimed that taxes were not prepaid, which directly contradicts their own invoice and the IOSS system.

For a premium-priced brand, this level of customer support and lack of responsibility is unacceptable. I would not recommend ordering from ALO if you are in the EU and want to avoid unexpected customs charges.

title: Good first experience
text:
I am writing this review so people don't get terrified when they order like I did after visiting this page. I MIGHT change my mind after I wash my clothes a few times, in which case I will come back and change my review, but so far so good.

Order: I placed my order and everything was sent crazy fast, i had it in Spain in like 2 days, coming from the US that's crazy. 

Returns: everybody had a bad experience and I'm so sorry for that. I didn't like the quality of one of the products, I took it to a parcel shop for return and in literally 3 days I had my money back, I was shocked at how fast this was. I don't have this even with brands in europe.

Quality: people say products are super bad. so far I can't talk much because I only had this for like 2 weeks. I washed all my hoodies inside out in delicate and hang them to dry. First wash came perfect. 

I wore two of them a few times, to the gym and at home, no pilling and no fuzz in my tshirts. One, I still have to wear but I do like the quality. 

I'm holding on on buying more stuff because people here say they get awful after a couple washes, so I'll wait and see, but so far my experience online has been positive and I would buy again.

title: Missing receipt and amazing customer service from Shania and Ashley!
text: I bought my daughter two pair of leggings and a pullover sweatshirt jacket for Christmas at Alo in Birmingham, AL at The Summit Shopping Center on December 21st. We paid cash for these items and the cost was $485.00.  I gave the sales associate my email address and was supposed to receive a receipt via email.  The leggings needed to be exchanged for a different size.  I never received the email receipt. My husband and I went to the store and explained this to one of their sales associates. S he called another worker who I think was an assistant manager.  Her name is Shania. She was extremely helpful and totally willing to assist and help research this purchase. She asked the store manager to go into the program under admin and the Manger, Ashley continued the search. They found the purchase and emailed me the receipt. I cannot believe how patient, nice and totally compliant these ladies were. We were thrilled to get the receipt and will continue to shop there from now on!!

title: I ordered the Accolade hoodie and…
text: I ordered the Accolade hoodie and sweatpant set in the color Ivory as a gift to my mom. However, when my order arrived, the hoodie and sweatpants were completely different colors. The hoodie was basically yellow, and the sweatpants were white. At first, we thought that they had been mislabeled because the colors were so different. I wasn't able to get ahold of anyone for around 2 weeks, so I wasn't able to gift the set. When I did finally get ahold of a representative, the only offers they gave me were to send back one of the items for a replacement. However, they couldn't guarantee which item was the one with the coloring issue (even though I felt like it was both items), and they said they couldn't promise that a new item would match either. They said it is common for color differences because they get products from different manufacturers and warehouses. Does that sound like a product I should be paying 300 dollars for when they can't even guarantee that the set that is literally supposed to be worn together will match?! After I expressed my concern about this, and that I would really not want to get stuck with another not-matching set, I asked if I could just have it exchanged for a different color or set so that they could guarantee it matched. I feel like that is not that crazy to ask for because they screwed up in the first place, and this is supposed to be a "premium" brand. But no, they came back and said that because I bought this set on sale, if they let me exchange it for a different color now, it would be about $100 more. It is not like I'm just wanting a new color for funsies. It is because the set that was sent to me is literally unwearable. They then offered me a refund, but now I feel like I am being ghosted by them, and I am worried I will never get the refund. I probably have emailed them 3 times and haven't heard back. Besides this fact, the quality of the already wrong colored sweat set is horrible. The sweatpants and hoodie are see-through, and you can see the outline of the pockets through the pants. The customer service is also not great, with super-long wait times, and I don't blame the representative for this, but the solutions offered to me until the refund were complete BS. They also tried to gaslight me over and over again, saying that the color differences were basically normal. I wish I could upload a photo of how bad the difference is. Talking to them just makes you feel like a peasant for having a problem paying for a $300 set that doesn't match.

title: I used to love Alo Yoga and truly saw…
text:
I used to love Alo Yoga and truly saw it as a premium brand, not only because of the quality of the products but also because of the experience they claim to offer. Unfortunately, my most recent visit to one of their stores completely changed that perception.

I purchased a pair of shoes at around 5:30 pm, and after trying them on more calmly at home, I realized I didn’t like how they fit. For that reason, I returned to the store the next day at 11:00 am to make a return. To my surprise, the staff refused to accept it, claiming that the shoes had already been worn, which is absolutely not true. They were never used outside and were in the exact same condition as when I purchased them.

What was even more disappointing than the refusal itself was the rude and dismissive attitude of the staff. No one took the time to listen to my explanation or attempt to offer a reasonable solution. For a brand with such high prices, the level of customer service I received was far below what I would expect.

It is extremely frustrating to invest in a brand that markets itself as premium and customer-focused, only to be treated this way when an issue arises. Being made to feel as though I was being dishonest was especially upsetting. Experiences like this make you seriously reconsider supporting the brand.

I sincerely hope Alo Yoga reviews this situation and the training of its in-store staff, particularly when it comes to customer service and handling returns. A premium brand is not just about the products, but also about how customers are treated.

title: Not very happy with the customer…
text: Not very happy with the customer service. Waited over 4 weeks for my item only to be told it not arriving as it’s out of stock. No refund issued and told I can have a store credit which I have never seen. Very unhappy and multiple attempts to make contact via e mail and on line. Was not even notified my item would not arrive. I had to e mail to find out. Not good enough and still no refund or anything!!! Tried the online chat which proved unsuccessful and they still only offered a store credit. Very bad company regarding customer service or refunds. Impossible to get any help and I am now out of pocket!!!

title: HORRIBLE Customer Service!!
text:
HORRIBLE Customer Service!!! 

I have been trying to get an issue resolved with Alo Yoga for over a week now, and the experience with customer support has been incredibly frustrating.

I have called their customer support line three separate times, each time waiting on hold for approximately 30 minutes. When I finally speak to a representative, I’m told they “can’t get an answer quickly” and am repeatedly pushed to continue the conversation via email instead.

After each call, I receive one initial email stating that they will reach out once the issue is resolved, and then nothing. No follow-up, no resolution, no response despite multiple attempts. I am now dealing with two different support representatives, both of whom have become completely unresponsive.

The most frustrating part is that I’ve done exactly what support asked — waited patiently, followed up via email, and given ample time for a response — yet I’ve been met with silence. There is no accountability, no timeline, and no way to escalate the issue.

For a brand at this price point, I expected far better customer service. Long hold times, unresolved issues, and being passed from phone support to email only to be ignored is unacceptable. At this point, I simply want my issue resolved, but the lack of communication makes that feel impossible.

I hope Alo takes customer support more seriously, because this experience has completely changed how I view the brand.

title: False claims, false advertisement and pressure to pay more after they ship your order.
text:
So basically, I am located outside the USA, more specifically in Europe.

I placed an AloYoga order, and at checkout, I am asked to input my address so shipping and taxes can be calculated. I am also prompted that the chart includes taxes and duties.
Again, before payment, I am told that
"The total amount you pay includes all applicable customs duties & taxes. We guarantee no additional charges on delivery." - This is called DDP Delivery

"DDP delivery, or Delivered Duty Paid, is an Incoterm where the seller handles all costs and risks (shipping, insurance, export/import duties, taxes, customs) until the goods are delivered to the buyer's specified location:

Guess what?

When the parcel arrived, I was asked to pay duties & taxes because they were not actually included.

So what would any person do in this case?

Check if they missed anything on the AloYoga website when they placed the order, check the terms of service, and so on.

Where I actually find that no, I don't need to pay any duties & taxes, and ALO guarantees that I don't need to do that.

So I contacted them and found out that they are actually lying about those claims, you need to pay additional import taxes & duties, they don't actually guarantee anything, even though they are marketing and saying everywhere that they do.

I saved the whole chat, but unfortunately, I'm not allowed to post links here...

This is a warning to anyone outside the USA who wants to order from them: you will need to pay additional taxes and have headaches...

title: Never received my refund I was promised by email 4 times
text: I ordered a pair of trainers for my daughter in November in the sale at £126, but due to the confusing size chart on their website I ordered the wrong size.  I spoke to Alo to ask about an exchange for the right size but they told me that because I'm outside of the US they couldn't offer me an exchange.  They said I should return the original pair then reorder them.  I returned the original pair but when I went to reorder them they'd gone back up to the full price of £180.  I spoke to them again and I was promised a refund for the difference between the full and sale price.  That refund never appeared so I had to chase via their online chat facility 4 times, each time I got an email response from 4 different customer support agents, all promising the refund via email, but this was never received.  My advice is to not order from them unless you're 100% sure you won't need to return the item(s)

title: Ordered on December 2
text:
Ordered on December 2. Never received it. Replacement issued December 15. Also never shipped.

After weeks of waiting, Alo admitted the item may never ship and tried to push a refund instead of honoring the sale or offering a comparable replacement. This is not acceptable for a brand at this price point.

Won’t be ordering again.

title: Poor & Bad customer service
text: Poor & Bad customer service, misleading online marketing promotion. No response despite multiple emails

title: Très déçue par le service client Alo…
text:
Très déçue par le service client Alo Yoga.
J’ai retourné ma commande le lendemain de sa livraison. Le suivi DHL indique clairement que le colis a été reçu par Alo Yoga le 01/12/2025.
Nous sommes aujourd’hui début janvier 2026 et je n’ai toujours reçu aucun remboursement, ni même un email de confirmation de réception du retour.
Malgré mes démarches, aucune communication, aucun suivi.
Pour une marque à ce niveau de prix, ce manque de sérieux et de transparence est inacceptable.
Je déconseille vivement tant que la gestion des retours et remboursements n’est pas améliorée.

title: Do not be fooled by the brand
text:
Very disappointing experience with Alo Yoga (Amsterdam store and customer service).

I purchased a gift card in the Amsterdam store that does NOT work online. This was never clearly communicated at the time of purchase. I live over 2 hours away, so returning to the store is not realistic.

I then tried to contact the Amsterdam store multiple times — they are completely unreachable. They do not answer the phone, and there is no direct way to contact them. Alo Yoga’s customer service claims they cannot help and even stated that they do not have contact details for their own store in the Netherlands, which is extremely strange and unprofessional for a global brand.

In short: I paid for a gift card I cannot use, the store is unreachable, and customer service refuses to take responsibility.
Do not be fooled by the branding. Be very careful with this company.

title: Achtung - Unseriös - Finger Weg!
text:

Also bislang absoluter Reinfall!!!!! Ganz ehrlich ,,Luxusmarke“ sieht für mich ganz anders aus. 

Ich habe den Schriftverkehr mit Alo gespeichert. Weiteres folgt 

Lasst die Finger von Alo -

title: Massive delays with orders they cannot…
text: Massive delays with orders they cannot fulfil. They seem very unorganised and lack communication. The best method of resolving a complaint…let’s just issue a refund with no explanation. Problem solved. If their products are anything like their service, then it’s a load of overpriced shite!

We are now stuck with approximately $400 worth of clothing that are not wearable. I will never purchase anything from AloYoga again.

title: Poor customer policies
text: This company in general has poor customer policies. Although I like their products they are not focused on customer. Their return policies are very strict and will not even allow store credit or simple color exchange after 30 days at the holiday season on gifts. Very disappointing for what is considered premium brand. I will say that lululemon is much more focused on customer service in my experience.

title: Terrible customer service
text: Terrible customer service. Won’t ever buy there again 😡

title: My order was shipped to the wrong…
text: My order was shipped to the wrong address. In the chat I was told my order would be returned to sender and refunded. This never happened.  Repeated attempts to chat or email have failed. Worst customer service. Especially considering the price point. Definitely sticking to Lululemon from now on.

title: Great Branding, Terrible Quality and Service
text:
Alo might look cool and have a nice aesthetic, but that’s about it. The quality is horrendous—loose threads, piling after a few wears, and seams falling apart. For a brand that charges premium prices, this is unacceptable. It’s all style, no substance.
The sizing is also inconsistent. I followed the size chart, but the fit is all over the place—some pieces are too tight, others too loose. Nothing fits like it should.
And don’t even get me started on their customer service. Completely useless. I reached out to try and resolve my issues, and got zero support. It's clear they care more about their branding than actually making a good product or standing behind it.
Bottom line: Don’t fall for the hype. There are way better brands out there that actually deliver on quality and customer care.

title: This company is awful!!
text: This company is awful!!! I will never buy from them again. I spent $1391 for my items during the 30% off sale. I received half my order and the other half that had the most items did not arrive. FedEx did try once to deliver it and then I never heard anything again. It fell out of the system and is still nowhere to be found to this day. They kept saying they would follow up and I finally had to dispute it with AMEX. This company is a joke and they take zero responsibility for not satisfying their customers. DO NOT BUY FROM HERE!

title: Cheap Material
text:
I got a pair of the wide leg jogging pants (in brown) for Christmas, I have worn them 4x and they have started to ball and shed between the legs. The draw string is cheap and got sucked through the washing machine. 
This is very disappointing for such an expensive pair of trousers.

title: Disappointing Experience
text:
I am extremely disappointed with my experience with ALO Yoga. I purchased a pair of leggings and a quarter-zip sweatshirt on November 9th as a Christmas gift for my wife. The total cost was over $300, which set the expectation for premium quality and customer service.
When my wife opened the gift on Christmas Day and tried it on for the first time, the fit was completely off—the leggings were uncomfortably tight, and the sweatshirt was far too large. Unfortunately, when I contacted ALO Yoga to request a return or exchange, I was told they would not accommodate us because the return window had closed—by a single day.
Given that this was a Christmas gift purchased well in advance and only tried on during the holiday, the refusal to make even a minimal exception is incredibly disappointing. For a company that positions itself as a high-end brand, this level of inflexibility and lack of empathy from customer service is unacceptable.
This experience has completely turned us off from shopping with ALO Yoga in the future. There are many brands offering comparable products, and customer service should be a key differentiator at this price point. Unfortunately, ALO Yoga fell far short.

title: ALO, overpriced and no customer service or support
text: Do not give Alo any business. What a horrible company.  Overpriced yoga clothes, and if you get something as a gift that doesn't fit, well, too bad, you are stuck with it.  They have virtually no way to contact customer service, no way to exchange, and they offer no help.  Try another means like their chat function, and the rep just repeats the same thing over and over between 5 minutes of no response, then they disconnect the chat.

title: Nice clothes, poor loyalty program
text: I like the clothes and have always received good customer service in the store and ordering online. However, like other reviewers, the loyalty program is worthless. No inventory and points cancel. It's really a scam.

title: Alo Yoga’s loyalty program is deeply…
text:
Alo Yoga’s loyalty program is deeply flawed.

Customers are encouraged to spend more in order to earn points, yet there is consistently no reward inventory available to redeem them.

Customer service confirmed in writing that points cannot be extended, no alternative or manual redemption is possible, and there is no timeline for restocking rewards — even senior management cannot override this.

As a result, points expire with no realistic opportunity for customers to use them.

This makes the loyalty program misleading in practice and not customer-friendly.

Customer service also stopped responding after I requested escalation and informed them of external reporting.

title: Negozio pazzesco , curato nei particolari
text: Negozio pazzesco, strada più bella di Roma. Organizzato benissimo su due piani uomo e donna , personale giovane e cordiale. Ho comprato delle cose che già conoscevo ma sono stata consigliata dai ragazzi di Alo. A presto , Sara il mio riferimento a Roma .

title: Order Marked Delivered but Never Received – No Refund
text:
I ordered sportswear from Alo Yoga during Black Friday and paid in full. After waiting an unusually long time, the tracking suddenly showed “Delivered,” but I never received the package.
I contacted Alo multiple times by email, but instead of helping, they repeatedly told me to “check with the local post office or neighbors” and kept sending the same tracking number that only says “Delivered.” No investigation, no replacement, and no refund.

This is extremely disappointing customer service, especially for a premium brand. When a customer pays and does not receive the product, the responsibility should not be pushed back onto the customer.

At this point, I am forced to escalate the matter through a payment dispute/chargeback.

I would not recommend ordering from Alo unless you are prepared to take the risk of receiving no support if something goes wrong.

title: If I could give a -1 I would

title: Frustrating and Embarrassing Experience
text:
We purchased 4 gift cards totaling $400 for our clients. While the cards were eventually activated, it took an unreasonable amount of work on our end to get there. What should have been a simple, thoughtful gesture turned into a stressful and embarrassing ordeal.

Customer service was slow and unhelpful. We had to repeatedly follow up because promised callbacks never happened, and we could never get the issue escalated to management. After all that effort, the only resolution offered was 10% off a future order — which feels insulting given the time, frustration, and embarrassment we endured.

Bottom line: The cards were finally activated, but the process was a disaster. Poor communication, lack of accountability, and no meaningful resolution. We will not be ordering again!

title: I am so disappointed with my online…
text: I am so disappointed with my online purchase from aloyoga.com. I live out of state from the Lynnfield, MA store. I drove an hour to pick it up the item and it was not there.  I was told it is in DC! Two days before Christmas. There was no indication that the item was not in stock in the store when I made the purchase. I chose "Pick Up" at checkout. It was not a "Ship to Store" purchase and nothing indicated it was not in stock. I wouldn't have ordered it if it was not in stock, and I wouldn't have wasted 2 hours driving down and back to not get it. Two days before Christmas. They couldn't cancel my order since they didn't have the item yet.  The manager showed me the computer screen and there was no option to cancel it, so I don't blame her, but do better ALO. I went to my car and chatted with an ALO customer support specialist, and they told me the same thing. For the amount of money you charge for your clothes, you should have an online purchasing system that doesn't screw over your customers. Weird that they could charge my credit card without having the item in their hand, but they couldn't cancel it/refund my money without it. (This is not bashing the staff btw--this is ALO's issue of not giving their staff options and trust to properly handle customer issues. They were limited by the poorly designed software.)

title: If I had the option to give zero stars
text:
If I had the option to give zero stars, I would. This was the worst customer service experience of my life.

I went to the Century City location and clearly explained the transaction to the employee before it happened. She confirmed she understood and said yes. Instead of doing what I requested, she did the exact opposite. When I contacted the manager at Century City, she refused to take responsibility or offer any solution. She repeatedly told me she would call me back, but never did.

I also contacted the customer service support team, and they refused to acknowledge the employee’s mistake. Because of this, I lost $125, and no one was willing to help or take accountability.

This is extremely unprofessional and dishonest. They make a mistake, then leave the customer to deal with the consequences. I was promised the issue would be resolved, but it never was.

I am very disappointed and embarrassed by how this company operates. I wish I had never made a purchase. Big shame on them.

text: Do not be fooled by social media. The quality of the clothes are so bad. Customer service is a joke. Unprofessional and unhelpful. Logo has fallen off trousers. Bobbles all over the hoodie. Avoid at all cost.

title: Excellent Quality and Outstanding Customer Service
text:
I had a fantastic experience with Alo.
Their customer service was very responsive, friendly, and genuinely helpful, which immediately made the experience feel easy and positive. Any questions I had were handled quickly and professionally.

The product quality is excellent  the fabric is unbelievably soft, truly like butter on my skin, while still feeling well-made and flattering. You can really feel the difference in quality as soon as you put it on.

Alo has now been added to my list of favourite brands, and I will absolutely be ordering again. Highly recommended.

title: Abysmal quality and lack of customer service
text:
Quality of clothing sub par and shockingly high prices for abysmal clothing!

I would highly avoid and shop elsewhere!

title: Dirty clothes and horrible Kaye
text: Item arrived dirty and worn. I contacted by email but no reply. I contacted the chat and Kaye was the most unhelpful customer service person I have ever met. Kaye did not take my complaint serious and came across very patronising. Not a good way to treat paying customers.

title: Broken Fraud System – Legit Customers Blocked, Orders Auto-Cancelled
text:
rarely write reviews, but this experience was so bad that I feel I have to.

On Black Friday, neither I nor my family and friends were able to successfully place an order with Alo. Every single attempt went the same way: the order appears to go through, and then within about two minutes it’s automatically cancelled with no clear explanation.

I initially thought this was just a Black Friday glitch due to high traffic, but even now, when I try to place an order, the exact same thing happens. Their fraud system is clearly misconfigured and is falsely flagging legitimate customers. From what I’ve seen and heard, a huge portion of orders – easily the majority – are being cancelled for no valid reason. It’s incredibly frustrating to spend time shopping, entering all your details, and then have your order silently killed by a broken system.

Alo seriously needs to review whatever back-end fraud tools they’re using and adjust the settings or vendor. Right now, it feels like they are treating genuine paying customers as fraud, and that’s not just “inconvenient” – it completely blocks people from buying from them at all. The amount of money their losing is insane especially around the holidays.

Until they fix this, I can’t recommend ordering from Alo online.

title: Poor Product Quality & Resolution Not…
text:
Poor Product Quality & Resolution Not Honoured

I was really disappointed with my recent experience with Alo Yoga. I purchased four items at a premium price point, and all of them developed significant bobbling after only one or two wears, and before washing. Given the brand’s reputation and cost, I expected much better quality.

When I contacted customer support, they initially offered two clear resolution options in writing: a replacement or an equivalent amount of store credit. However, when I followed up, I was told that there was “no record” of this offer, despite providing the original email. The offer then changed to a 10% discount or $25 towards a future purchase, which did not address the value of the affected items or the original written commitment.

I requested that my case be escalated to senior management, but was informed that my feedback and request were rejected. Unfortunately, my issue remains unresolved, and the inconsistency between the first written offer and the reduced compensation was very disappointing.

I had hoped for a higher standard of customer care, especially after raising a legitimate quality concern supported by written correspondence. As it stands, both the product quality and the handling of my complaint fell short of expectations.Would highly not recommend purchasing from the company!

title: Edward Grossmith
text:
Edward Grossmith
2 recensioni

un attimo fa
Nuova
I had one of the most unpleasant shopping experiences I’ve ever had at this store. A sales associate spoke to me in an extremely condescending and dismissive way, as if I was inconveniencing them just by asking questions. Their tone made me feel embarrassed and unwelcome, and it completely ruined my visit.

Instead of offering help, they acted like I didn’t deserve their time. No customer should be made to feel small or judged while trying to shop.

About my experience.

When I asked about a membership discount that I was informed of earlier, the sales associate at the till responded with a very firm and dismissive “no.” When I politely requested clarification or to speak to a manager, she spoke into her headset while laughing and exaggerating the situation, saying “the customer here is insisting there are discounts.” I had simply asked once — there was no need for the attitude or mockery.

Her tone and behavior were extremely unprofessional. A manager then stepped in, but unfortunately the customer service only became worse, offering no solution, just more dismissiveness.

It may be worth reminding the staff that they are working in retail and interacting with customers who choose to spend their money here . Basic respect should not be optional, regardless of the product being sold(sportswear for unfit people that live in Chelsea).

This brand may enjoy its current hype, but with service like this, it won’t last. Many stores have faded quickly because they forgot that customers remember how they are treated.

At the end of the day, it’s sportswear and not Cartier. I would like to remind this to the sales associate that was laughing.

title: As a loyal Alo customer who spends…
text:
As a loyal Alo customer who spends thousands of dollars yearly with your brand, I am extremely disappointed to be writing this message. I placed an order with multiple items, and although one of those items was marked as included, it was not in the package.

When I called customer service, I was first told, incorrectly, that the missing item would arrive the next day. After being placed on hold for several minutes, the representative changed his statement and said it would take three business days. I was then transferred to a supervisor, Jom, who assured me the item would be delivered within 24 hours. That conversation took place on Sunday around noon. It is now Tuesday at 10 p.m., and I still have not received the item.

I am furious, disappointed, and feel genuinely disrespected as a loyal customer. This experience does not reflect the standard of service expected from Alo, especially given the premium prices we pay. I truly hope this matter is addressed with the seriousness it deserves.

title: Fake 30% app discount
text: Recently had a terrible experience when buying a gift online. On the website, it was saying there was a 30% discount when purchasing via the App (iOS only), with a countdown of 8h30min still left on the clock. I downloaded the App, picked up my basket to complete the purchase, and it showed, under each item, the updated price with the note "discount to be applied at checkout". The only problem is that when I pressed NEXT at the end, it charged me the full price and any note of the discount disappeared... I reached out to ask for info and a potential refund, and the customer support replied that "it is not in their policy" to do anything. This is a fraudulent behaviour, baiting customers to buy with the promise of a fake discount!
